user.title: Add EnBW charge station
user.description: Provide configuration data. See documentation for further info.

data_description.name: The name shown for this charge station device.
data_description.station_number: Station number obtained from the EnBW map via developer tools. Leave empty to search nearby stations.
data_description.latitude: Latitude of the location from which to search for charge stations.
data_description.longitude: Longitude of the location from which to search for charge stations.
data_description.search_radius: Radius in kilometers to search for charge stations.
data_description.api_key: API key obtained from the EnBW map via the Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key header in developer tools.

search_station.title: Select charge station
search_station.description: Select the station you would like to add from the list below.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure EnBW charge station
reconfigure.description: Update the configuration for this charge station.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate EnBW charge station
reauth_confirm.description: The API key was rejected. Please enter a new API key.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the EnBW API. Please try again.
error.no_stations_found: No charge stations were found near the given location.

abort.already_configured: This charge station is already configured.

cannot_connect.message: Failed to connect to the EnBW API.

invalid_auth.message: The API key was rejected by the EnBW API.
